assertions.description: INCORRECT: The MC4558CPT is a dual bipolar op-amp (STMicroelectronics). It appears in signal_analysis.crystal_circuits with type='active_oscillator'. Op-amps are not oscillators by nature, and this schematic uses the MC4558CPT as a signal buffer/driver, not as an oscillator. The same false positive also appears in foxglove_foxglove.sch.json for the same IC. The crystal_circuits detector is incorrectly triggering on general-purpose op-amp library symbols.
